data.title: Gamestop, Lululemon, Uber, Ulta Beauty And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: On Thursday, major U.S. indices closed in the red, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average slipping 0.5% to 44,765.71.

data.title: Tim Cook Explains Why Apple Defied Steve Jobs' Design Philosophy With the iPhone 16's Camera Button, Touches On Retirement Plans: 'I'll Do It Until…'
data.description: Tim Cook discussed Apple's strategic evolution, including the iPhone 16's new camera button, Vision Pro sales, AirPods addressing hearing loss, and his future as CEO, emphasizing user experience, AI foresight, and health democratization.

data.title: Trump Appoints Venture Capitalist David Sacks As White House Crypto And AI Czar: 'He Will Work On A Legal Framework'
data.description: President-elect Donald Trump announced the appointment of renowned venture capitalist David Sacks as the “White House A.I. & Crypto Czar” on Thursday.

data.title: Federal Judge Rejects Boeing's Plea Deal In 737 Max Fraud Case, Cites Concerns Over Diversity Policies And Monitor Selection
data.description: A federal judge rejected Boeing Co.'s plea agreement on Thursday, Dec. 5, 2024 in the criminal fraud case stemming from two fatal 737 Max crashes, citing concerns over diversity, equity and inclusion policies in the selection of a government-appointed monitor.

data.title: GameStop-Themed Memecoins Explode As Roaring Kitty Returns With Intriguing X Post: GME Coin Shoots Up Over 80%
data.description: Legendary trader Keith Gill, popularly known as Roaring Kitty, returned to social media on Thursday, sparking a wild spike in cryptocurrencies related to GameStop Corp. (NYSE:GME).
